chunks.page_summary: This page provides a technical drawing and specifications for the Rheonics SRV-HS-X5 Hygienic Long Probe SRV, detailing its dimensions, pressure rating, material, and hygienic certification options.

key_facts: The document provides detailed dimensional information for the Rheonics SRV-HS-X5 Hygienic Long Probe SRV.
The maximum operating pressure for the device is 100 bar (1500 psi).
The probe is constructed from 316 stainless steel.
The product supports 3-A and EHEDG hygienic certification options.
Hygienic certification is available for specific flanges or process connections.
The probe has a minimum insertion length of 80 mm (3.15 inches).
Rheonics specializes in inline process density and viscosity monitoring.
The product is protected by granted and pending US and International patents.
